title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: Yes, this is the right minimal fix. - Root cause matches your hypothesis: the failure is from `monitor` fail-close before startup lane ramp reaches quorum, not from the post-run audit criteria. - Raising `CODEX_KERNEL_QUORUM_STARTUP_GRACE_SECONDS` only for smoke invocations is scoped and low-risk. - It preserves strictness because you are not changing: - lane minimums - phase-evidence requirements - final timeout-audit checks Recommended range: - Start with `35` seconds as default smoke override. - Acceptable range is `30-45` seconds. - Use `45` only if CI/host load is consistently high. Practical guidance: - Apply it only around `run_codex_smoke` (not globally). - Keep `CODEX_KERNEL_SMOKE_TIMEOUT_SEC` as the outer cap so hangs still terminate. - Do not relax `min_active_lanes`/`required_phase_evidence`; this should be a startup-ramp grace fix only.
